page_title: Terms of Service — AI Business Studio London
heading: Terms of Service
body:
Welcome to AI Business Studio London. By accessing this website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions of use.

### 1. Use of Site Content

All text, photography, layout, and visual assets on this site are protected by intellectual property laws. You may browse the site and submit enquiries, but reproduction of any content without prior written permission is strictly prohibited.

### 2. Disclaimer of Business Advice

The information on this website is for general informational and branding purposes only. It does not constitute binding professional consultancy or strategy advice. Engagements only start after a mutual agreement is signed.

### 3. Invitation Request Policy

Submitting a request for invitation via our contact form does not create a business relationship or guarantee that AI Business Studio London will engage in a strategic partnership with your organization. We evaluate enquiries selectively.

### 4. Governing Law

These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes relating to these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.
